steps.title: Find b
steps.content:
At $t=0$, the object is $57.76$ feet above the ground. Since $h(0)=-16(0)^2+b=b$, the function is
$$h(t)=-16t^2+57.76$$

steps.title: Solve h(t)=0
steps.content:
The object hits the ground when its height is $0$:
$$-16t^2+57.76=0$$
$$16t^2=57.76$$
$$t^2=3.61$$
$$t=\sqrt{3.61}=1.9$$

steps.title: Confirm the positive time
steps.content: Time cannot be negative, so use the positive solution. Since $1.9=\frac{19}{10}$, accepted entries include 1.9 or 19/10.
